title: gentianodes stipitata
intro: Gentianodes stipitata, also known as yellow gentian, is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family, native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand. It has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gentianodes stipitata are said to include relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and diarrhea, as well as its potential to help manage stress and anxiety. Gentianodes stipitata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
